name: Clockwork Clutch Safe
description: Time three live clutch releases through coupled gear ratios and stop all seal rings inside one simultaneous phase window.
natural_language: Run the gear train, release each clutch at the witness mark, and open the safe with all three seals at zero.

metadata.notes: New Interaction VII–VIII candidate. The browser renders the generated physical state and records only ordinary pointer/keyboard control events; the live server and exported verifier independently replay the mechanic-specific geometry or dynamics.
